notes: v0.28.0 — 16 themed projectiles + 16 themed trails matching the hull kits. Each kit ships its own bullet + trail (ASH PULSE / SUN SPARK / PRISM DART / VOID ECHO etc.), all cross-class mixable: PRISM bullets on a VOID hull with a CATHEDRAL trail is now a valid loadout. Tier matches hulls (2 free + 1 PULSE 10k + 1 SURGE 200 per class). 12 new procedural bullet shapes in bullet.gd. Legacy chevron/bolt/diamond/fragment + jet/ribbon/particles/comet IDs auto-migrate via PROJ_RENAME / TRAIL_RENAME so existing equipped cosmetics carry over.
